html:
Exclusive to:  


Maxwell Statues are naturally-spawning Structures that can be found in various Set Pieces, although they are most common in Chess biomes in Survival Mode. They were constructed by Maxwell during his time on the Nightmare Throne, as a monument to himself — however, now that Charlie has replaced him as ruler of The Constant, they only serve as an ironic mockery of his past actions. They are often guarded by local Clockwork Monsters. When mined using a Pickaxe or similar tool, explosive, Old Bell, or Weather Pain, they drop 2-3 Marble.

Maxwell Statues make two notable appearances in Adventure Mode:

  • In Chapter 3, assuming the template is not "Two Worlds", the Chess biome where Wes is being held prisoner contains several Statues being used to trap him, which release 3-4 Clockwork Monsters when destroyed. To save Wes and unlock him, the player must destroy every Statue and defeat the Monsters spawned from them.
  • In "Checkmate", there is a Statue just before the Nightmare Throne that spawns 3-4 Clockwork Monsters when broken; However, it also reduces the player's Sanity to 0 until they are all defeated.


Trivia

  • This structure was added in A Little Rain Must Fall update, but only naturally generated following the Doorway to Adventure update.

Gallery

  • Maxwell Statue when mined.
  • Maxwell Statue when mined, almost broken.
  • Maxwell Statue in the Maxwell's Cemetery Set Piece in Sandbox Mode.
  • Maxwell Statue in the Locked Wes Set Piece in Adventure Mode.
  • The Statue spawning Clockwork Bishops after being mined.
  • The End is Nigh artwork with a Maxwell Statue.
  • A Maxwell Statue, as seen in the A New Reign cinematic.
  • A Maxwell Statue as seen on the Steam "Nightmare" wallpaper.
  • Maxwell Statue from poster from Jeff Agala's tumbler[1]
DSTDSRoGSWHam

  1. ↑ Jeff Agala's tumbler post

–Maxwell
“I would very much like to talk to him.”
–Wagstaff

“That's the guy who said he could help us.”
–Webber
“Guy's got an ego problem.”
–Walani
“He is literally made of stone.”
–Warly
“I'd know thet scallywag's face anywheres!”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A MR. MEANY PANTS MADE O' STONE”
–Wilba
“Alive?”
–Wormwood
“A little pretentious for my taste.”
–Wheeler

In Chapter 3, assuming the template is not "Two Worlds", the Chess biome where Wes is being held prisoner contains several Statues being used to trap him, which release 3-4 Clockwork Monsters when destroyed. To save Wes and unlock him, the player must destroy every Statue and defeat the Monsters spawned from them.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tượng Maxwell là các Cấu trúc sinh sản tự nhiên có thể được tìm thấy trong nhiều Bộ Vá khác nhau, mặc dù chúng phổ biến nhất trong quần xã Cờ vua ở Chế độ Sinh tồn. Chúng được Maxwell xây dựng trong thời gian ông ở trên Ngai ác mộng, như một tượng đài cho chính ông - tuy nhiên, giờ đây Charlie đã thay thế ông làm người cai trị The Constant, chúng chỉ nhằm mục đích chế nhạo những hành động trong quá khứ của ông. Chúng thường được bảo vệ bởi các Quái vật Đồng hồ địa phương. Khi khai thác bằng Cuốc hoặc công cụ tương tự, chất nổ, Chuông Cũ hoặc Đau Thời Tiết, chúng rơi ra 2-3 Đá Cẩm Thạch.

'''Maxwell Statues''' are naturally-spawning [[Structure]]s that can be found in various [[Set Piece]]s, although they are most common in [[Chess]] biomes in [[Survival Mode]]. They were constructed by [[Maxwell]] during his time on the [[Nightmare Throne]], as a monument to himself — however, now that [[Charlie]] has replaced him as ruler of [[The Constant]], they only serve as an ironic mockery of his past actions. They are often guarded by local [[Clockwork Monsters]]. When mined using a [[Pickaxe]] or similar tool, explosive, [[Old Bell]], or [[Weather Pain]], they drop 2-3 [[Marble]].

Maxwell Statues make two notable appearances in [[Adventure Mode]]:

*In Chapter 3, assuming the template is not "Two Worlds", the Chess biome where [[Wes]] is being held prisoner contains several Statues being used to trap him, which release 3-4 Clockwork Monsters when destroyed. To save Wes and unlock him, the player must destroy every Statue and defeat the Monsters spawned from them.
*In "Checkmate", there is a Statue just before the Nightmare Throne that spawns 3-4 Clockwork Monsters when broken; However, it also reduces the player's [[Sanity]] to 0 until they are all defeated.


=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* This structure was added in ''[[Version History#A Little Rain Must Fall|A Little Rain Must Fall]]'' update, but only naturally generated following the ''[[Version History#Doorway to Adventure|Doorway to Adventure]]'' update.
